title: Utkal Balashram Kandhamal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Store Keeper-cum-Accountant, House Father Posts
short_info: Utkal Balashram Kandhamal has released the official Store Keeper-cum-Accountant, House Father Notification 2026 on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the Utkal Balashram Kandhamal Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 to 45 years with qualifications such as PG preferably in Commerce/Finance or Graduation in Arts discipline can apply through email mode up to 30 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation: No upper age relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: PG preferably Commerce/Finance for Store Keeper-cum-Accountant; Graduation in arts discipline for House Father.
qualification.details: Store Keeper-cum-Accountant: PG preferably in Commerce/Finance. Relevant experience will be given preference. House Father: Graduation in arts discipline. Preference will be given to Home Science, Psychology, and Sociology graduates. Relevant experience will be given preference.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 18,536/- Per Month for Store Keeper-cum-Accountant; Rs. 14,564/- Per Month for House Father.
salary_details.details: Store Keeper-cum-Accountant: Rs. 18,536/- Per Month House Father: Rs. 14,564/- Per Month

selection_process: Selection will be made after short-listing by the selection committee on the basis of academic career and experience. Selection of candidates will be made on the basis of procedure specified in the resolution No.10102-WCD-CW-MISC-0023-2020. Dt-15.09.2020 issued by the Women & Child Development Department

as decided by the Selection Committee constituted for the purpose. The selection of the candidates shall made by the selection committee constituted as per the resolution vide No -10102-WCD-CW-0023-2020
Dt 15.09.2020 of Women & Child Development Department
Govt of Odisha. The recruitment shall be on the basis of career marking as per weightage assigned below or the selection committee decides as think fit and proper.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Utkal Balashram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Utkal Balashram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving the hard copy of the application is 30 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the email address for applying to Utkal Balashram?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent to the email address: [email protected]. Only applications received via this email will be accepted.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in this Utkal Balashram recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of Store Keeper-cum-Accountant and House Father.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years for all posts.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Store Keeper-cum-Accountant post?
faq.answer: For the Store Keeper-cum-Accountant position, a Post Graduate degree preferably in Commerce or Finance is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the House Father post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the House Father post will receive a salary of Rs. 14,564/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no upper age relaxation mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on academic career and experience, as decided by the selection committee following specific government resolutions.

faq.question: Q9. What documents need to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to submit self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs along with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. Can applications be submitted through modes other than email?
faq.answer: No, applications received through any mode other than the specified email address will not be accepted and will be summarily rejected.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Utkal Balashram Recruitment 2026?
